feed.title: 全球互联网百晓生 · 事件流
feed.subtitle: 实时事件订阅源，基于情报站数据

entry.title: Strike Risk Looms Over Pangyo... Kakao Enters Labor Commission Mediation Today - 아시아경제

summary.p: 亚太Kakao进入劳动委员会调解
标签：合作机会 | 类型：strategy | 地区：亚太 | 级别：D

entry.title: Rakuten Bank Shares Jump as Mizuho Considers Investment - Bloomberg.com

summary.p: 日本传统银行Mizuho拟投资Rakuten Bank，显示金融科技与传统银行融合趋势，为银行IT系统集成带来机会
标签：资金流向 | 类型：earnings | 地区：亚太 | 级别：D
来源：Google News

entry.title: Kin Health raises $9M to build an AI notetaker for patients

summary.p: 美国医疗AI赛道持续获投，患者端AI应用为医疗IT集成商提供新接口机会
标签：资金流向 | 类型：funding | 地区：全球 | 级别：D

entry.title: Meta begins cutting 8,000 jobs this week as record profits fund a $145 billion AI infrastructure bet

summary.p: Meta大规模裁员并重注AI基础设施，云服务和AI芯片供应商受益

entry.title: Sigma Computing doubles valuation to $3 billion in Series E as agentic analytics race heats up

entry.title: Coursera announces $500 million buyback one week after closing its $2.5 billion Udemy merger

entry.title: StreamElements confirms acquisition talks amid shutdown speculation

summary.p: 全球游戏直播工具商StreamElements寻求收购，同类SaaS平台面临整合压力，API集成商需评估合作风险

entry.title: Mistplay launches Audience Network for rewarded advertising following acquisitions

entry.title: Kenya appoints Adan Mohamed as tax chief amid revenue pressure
